command.acs.flavor.list.description: List available packages and disk-bandwidth combinations for Application Cloud Servers.
command.acs.instance.create.description: Create one or more Application Cloud Servers from a selected package.
command.acs.instance.rebuild.description: Rebuild an Application Cloud Server with its original image or another image.
command.acs.instance.update-flavor.descr: Upgrade the package, bandwidth, and system disk size of an Application Cloud Server.
command.acs.lite-flavor.list.description: List available fixed and bandwidth packages for legacy Light Cloud Hosts; this API is offline.
command.acs.lite-instance.create.descrip: Create a legacy Light Cloud Host from a fixed or bandwidth package; this API is offline.
command.acs.lite-instance.rebuild.descri: Rebuild a legacy Light Cloud Host with its original image or another image; this API is offline.
command.acs.lite-instance.update-spec.de: Upgrade the package of a stopped legacy Light Cloud Host; this API is offline.
name: Application Cloud Server
parameter.acs.flavor.list.az_name.descri: Availability zone name; omit to return packages from every zone
parameter.acs.instance.create.auto_renew: Automatic renewal status: 0 disables renewal and 1 enables it
Bandwidth in Mbit/s for the selected package
parameter.acs.instance.create.boot_disk_: System disk size in GB for the selected package
parameter.acs.instance.create.client_tok: Unique client token retained for 24 hours to make the order idempotent
parameter.acs.instance.create.cycle_coun: Subscription duration used with cycle type, up to 60 months
parameter.acs.instance.create.data_disk_: Data disk objects, with at most five disks per host
parameter.acs.instance.create.image_id.d: Image ID in the selected region
parameter.acs.instance.create.ip_version: Elastic IP version; defaults to ipv4
parameter.acs.instance.create.order_coun: Number of hosts to purchase, from 1 to 10; defaults to 1
parameter.acs.instance.create.security_p: Security protection edition; defaults to false
parameter.acs.instance.create.user_passw: Host user password, 8 to 30 characters and subject to the documented complexity rules
New image ID; omit to reuse the original image
User password after rebuild, 8 to 30 characters and subject to the documented complexity rules
parameter.acs.instance.update-flavor.ban: Bandwidth in Mbit/s for the target package
parameter.acs.instance.update-flavor.boo: System disk size in GB for the target package
parameter.acs.instance.update-flavor.cli: Unique client token retained for 24 hours to make the order idempotent
parameter.acs.lite-flavor.list.az_name.d: Availability zone name; omit to return packages from every zone
parameter.acs.lite-flavor.list.flavor_se: Package type: fix for a fixed package or band for a bandwidth package
parameter.acs.lite-instance.create.auto_: Automatic renewal status: 0 disables renewal and 1 enables it
parameter.acs.lite-instance.create.az_na: Availability zone name; required for 4.0 regions; use the actual zone name for multi-zone regions and default for single-zone regions
parameter.acs.lite-instance.create.bandw: Bandwidth in Mbit/s for a bandwidth package; ignored for a fixed package
parameter.acs.lite-instance.create.boot_: System disk size in GiB for a bandwidth package; ignored for a fixed package
parameter.acs.lite-instance.create.clien: Unique client token retained for 24 hours to make the order idempotent
parameter.acs.lite-instance.create.cycle: Subscription duration used with cycle type, up to 60 months
parameter.acs.lite-instance.create.data_: Data disk objects, with at most five disks per host
parameter.acs.lite-instance.create.flavo: Package type: fix for a fixed package or band for a bandwidth package
parameter.acs.lite-instance.create.image: Image ID in the selected region
parameter.acs.lite-instance.create.ip_ve: Elastic IP version; defaults to ipv4
parameter.acs.lite-instance.create.user_: Host user password, 8 to 30 characters and subject to the documented complexity rules
parameter.acs.lite-instance.rebuild.imag: New image ID; omit to reuse the original image
parameter.acs.lite-instance.rebuild.pass: User password after rebuild, 8 to 30 characters and subject to the documented complexity rules
Bandwidth in Mbit/s for a bandwidth package; ignored for a fixed package
System disk size in GiB for a bandwidth package; ignored for a fixed package
Unique client token retained for 24 hours to make the order idempotent
Package type: fix for a fixed package or band for a bandwidth package
